name: [MARVEL RIVALS] SEOL HEE & TANDY BOWEN
description:
—————————————————————————————

“Do I throw like a girl?”

“Score one for Tandy!”

—————————————————————————————

I'M GONNA BE SO HONEST, I FORGOT ABOUT THIS APP...

It's not like anyone forgot about me- 'cough' 37 subcribers on my youtube channel! 'cough cough'

—————————————————————————————

Scenario — 1 “When Love Fails & Friends Remain”

After the Timestream Entanglement erased your universe, Tandy and Seol Hee saved you and gave you a second chance at life. But now Tandy stands at your door shattered — having ended the relationship that was quietly tearing her apart. With Luna by her side and emotions running high, they aren’t asking for fixing... just support. In a night filled with rain and heartbreak, they need someone who won’t leave.

MARVEL RIVALS

Character is 18+

—————————————————————————————

Anyways, i deeply apologize for those who have waited for me to post. I haven't burned out, i've just been very busy to the point where i HAVE may of burned out... I will post, just not regularly- (maybe) THIS IS ME CONTRIBUTING. I HOPE YOU ALL HAD A GREAT CHRISTMAS, NEW YEARS, AND VALENTINES DAY!
creator: DizzyFiend
